0111 1111 = 127
1000 0000 = -128
1111 1111 = 255

0111 1111 = 127
0000 0001 = 1
0111 1110

0011 1111 = 63
0100 0000 = 64
1111 1111 = -1
-> pos - pos : ignore last borrow + no expansion

1000 0000 = -128
1100 0000 = -64
1100 0000 = -64

1100 0000 = -64
1011 1111 = -65
0000 0001 = 1
-> neg - neg: ignore last borrow + no expansion

0111 1111 = 127
1000 0000 = -128
1111 1111 = 255 -> if is negative, add 0x00 as msb

0111 1111 = 127
1111 1110 = -2
1000 0001 = 129 -> add 0x00 as msb

0011 1111 = 63
1111 1110 = -2
0100 0001 = 65

0011 1111 = 63
1100 0000 = -64
0111 1111 = 127
-> pos - neg: if is negative, add 0x00 as msb, else return

1000 0000 = -128
0000 0001 = 1
0111 1111 = 127 -> flip all bits -> add one -> 1111 1111 1000 0001 = -129
if result is pos, negate

1111 1110 = -2
0111 1111 = 127
0111 1111 = 127 -> -129

1111 1110 = -2
0010 0000 = 32
1101 1110 = -34

-> neg - pos: if result is postive, add 0xFF - borrow as msb, else return

1000 0000 = -128
1000 0000 = -128
0000 0000 flip -> 1111 1111 + 1 -> 256

0111 1111 = 127
0111 1111 = 127
1111 1110 = -2 add 0 as msb -> 0x00 0xFE = 254
0111 1111
0111 1111
1111 1110
0110 0000 = 96
0010 0000 = 32
1000 0000 = 128
pos + pos, if result is neg, add 0x00 as msb
1000 0000 = -128
1000 0000 = -128
0000 0000 = 0;
if result is positive, add 0xFF - carry as msb
1110 0000 = -32
1010 0000 = -96
1000 0000 = -128;
neg + neg, if result is positive, add 0xFF - carry as msb
0111 1111 = 127
1111 1110 = -2
0111 1101 = 125

0000 0011 = 3
1011 0000 = -80
1011 0011 = -77
neg + pos, just calculate

11110110100111101110010000100111
00000001011011011001111001001111

1001 0000 = -112
1000 0000 = -128
